title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 370.088 - Branches required to be located in geographic area of the credit union
text:
370.088.  Branches required to be located in geographic area of the credit union. — Any geographic area credit union-owned branch where deposits or shares are accepted for member's accounts, loan applications are accepted, or loans are disbursed shall be located in the geographic area of that credit union.
(L. 2007 S.B. 591)
